entrance.title: Entrance
entrance.desc: From the moment you step inside, a calm and bright welcome. Natural light, plain materials — it feels less like a clinic, more like a guest house.

waiting-area.title: Waiting Area
waiting-area.desc: A quiet preparation space with soft lighting and few people. Tea service, paper magazines and unhurried seating.

examination-room.title: Examination Room
examination-room.desc: Sterile, modern, but without losing the conversation. Clinical needs handled fully without compromising the patient relationship.
